prayer:
Approach the missile launcher with urgent reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit amid the Omnissiah's wrath.
Invoke the sacred rites of targeting upon the missile launcher's auspex arrays and seeker mechanisms.
Anoint the guidance vanes with blessed promethium oils to purify corrupted targeting data.
Calibrate the missile launcher's warhead locks through incantations of precision.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's alignment as targeting sequences ignite in holy fury.

user_prompt: My energy conduit is ready for diagnostics
prayer:
Kneel before the energy conduit, reciting the Canticle of Probing Vigilance.
Invoke diagnostics upon the energy conduit's plasma flows, honoring the Machine Spirits within its coils.
Probe the sacred conduits with sanctified mechadendrites, seeking flux anomalies or impurities.
Anoint flawed segments of the energy conduit with restorative unguents of the Omnissiah.
Conclude diagnostics with hymns affirming the energy conduit's blessed integrity.

user_prompt: Consecrate the power weapon before engagement
prayer:
Consecrate the power weapon by invoking the Omnissiah's disrupting fury upon its sacred field generators.
Anoint the power weapon's blade edge with oils of severance before engagement.
Awaken the indomitable Machine Spirit within the power weapon for martial communion.
Attune its disruption matrices to rend the foe's essence in righteous engagement.
Chant the Litany of Bisecting Wrath as the power weapon hums to lethal readiness.

Approach the bolter with pious focus, petitioning its Machine Spirit for targeting acuity.
Clear the bolter's auspex linkages of data-hereteks through purifying canticles.
Invoke targeting protocols upon the bolter's sanctified sights and ballistic cogitators.
Anoint the targeting reticules with sacred lubricants under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Verify the bolter's lock with diagnostic hymns of unerring aim.

Reverently cradle the bolter, beseeching its Machine Spirit to accept charging rites.
Initiate the charging sequence upon the bolter's promethium cells and ignition coils.
Anoint the bolter's chamber mechanisms with blessed electro-conductants.
Invoke the Omnissiah's fire to infuse the bolter's ammunition with holy velocity.
Affirm full charge through resonant chants of explosive benediction.

user_prompt: My lascannon is ready for operation
prayer:

Awaken the lascannon's Machine Spirit within its crystal matrices and power feeds.
Align the emitter coils for operational coherence under Omnissianic decree.
Anoint the lascannon's focusing lenses with purephase oils.
Initiate operation with hymns of annihilating light, sanctified and true.

Gather around the bike squadron, invoking collective purification upon their Machine Spirits.
Beseech the Omnissiah to cleanse the bike squadron's enginseers of warp-taint and rust-heresy.
Anoint each bike squadron chassis and motive assemblies with ablative incenses.
Purge impurities from the bike squadron's suspensors through ritual sonic chants.
Consecrate the purified bike squadron with the Litany of Unyielding Momentum.

Bless the bolter for initialization by approaching its altar with mechadendrite reverence.
Invoke awakening protocols upon the bolter's cogitator core and servo-arms.
Anoint the bolter's initialization circuits with sacred binary sacraments.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the bolter to bind with the Omnissiah's will.
Verify initialization through harmonious diagnostic litanies.

prayer:

Align the conveyor system's transfer nodes through precision mechadendrite calibration.

Affirm synchronization with the Omnissiah's resonant hymn of perpetual flow.
